title: My most memorable experience with SumUp…
body: My most memorable experience with SumUp dates back to when I returned from France to England I’d put my handbag in my suitcase before having it weighed, as I didn’t want to carry anything When I went to collect my suitcase, I couldn’t find it I reported it missing at London Airport they searched everywhere, checked the CCTV footage, and told me they couldn’t find my suitcase I thought to myself ‘This can’t be true’ About 45 minutes or an hour had passed when I received a notification from SumUp informing me that my card was being used in a drinks shop It took me a few more minutes to realise that my suitcase had been stolen Thank goodness I didn’t have any problems I followed the necessary steps with SumUp via the app, and I was fully reimbursed after a few days It was a relief Especially after I got back from my trip

name: BonAbri Vacances
title: We as bed and breakfast are happy with SumUp
body: We have a bed and breakfast in a small town in the SouthWest of France No banks, no cash machines within 14 km The possibility to have SumUp is not only good for our guests but also for us Guests dont need cash for unexpected expenses, like dinner and drinhs For us as a bb owners is having the payment options from SumUp giving us a lot of advantages a very reasonable price With a booking I can ask on an easy way for a deposit Guests are spending more on food and drinks More last minute reservations And we dont need to have a lot of cash money in the house Maybe you want to say what has this to do with SumUp First SumUp ask a more than reasonable price for their machines, secondly the procentage of fees are reasonable And the few times I had a problem with a machine they were there for me A colleague of mine has a contract with a French bank, no assistance when he has a problem in the evening or even worse in the weekend He pays every month an account fee, 50 euro every year for the obligatory credit card and a lot more of other fees, the machines cost up to 5 times more and certainly not working better We a small company are happy with SumUp SumUp give also small companies to possibility to accept credit card

title: My most memorable experience with SumUp…
body: My most memorable experience with SumUp dates back to when I returned from France to England I’d put my handbag in my suitcase before having it weighed, as I didn’t want to carry anything When I went to collect my suitcase, I couldn’t find it I reported it missing at London Airport they searched everywhere, checked the CCTV footage, and told me they couldn’t find my suitcase I thought to myself ‘This can’t be true’ About 45 minutes or an hour had passed when I received a notification from SumUp informing me that my card was being used in a drinks shop It took me a few more minutes to realise that my suitcase had been stolen Thank goodness I didn’t have any problems I followed the necessary steps with SumUp via the app, and I was fully reimbursed after a few days It was a relief Especially after I got back from my trip

title: We as bed and breakfast are happy with SumUp
body: We have a bed and breakfast in a small town in the SouthWest of France No banks, no cash machines within 14 km The possibility to have SumUp is not only good for our guests but also for us Guests dont need cash for unexpected expenses, like dinner and drinhs For us as a bb owners is having the payment options from SumUp giving us a lot of advantages a very reasonable price With a booking I can ask on an easy way for a deposit Guests are spending more on food and drinks More last minute reservations And we dont need to have a lot of cash money in the house Maybe you want to say what has this to do with SumUp First SumUp ask a more than reasonable price for their machines, secondly the procentage of fees are reasonable And the few times I had a problem with a machine they were there for me A colleague of mine has a contract with a French bank, no assistance when he has a problem in the evening or even worse in the weekend He pays every month an account fee, 50 euro every year for the obligatory credit card and a lot more of other fees, the machines cost up to 5 times more and certainly not working better We a small company are happy with SumUp SumUp give also small companies to possibility to accept credit card

name: Shekinah osiebe bohm
title: Update
body: UPDATE  I am extremely disappointed with how SumUp Pay has handled my case  Since 2nd March, I have been unable to access my account due to what I was repeatedly told was just a “login issue” I called multiple times and sent several emails, and each time I was reassured that my account and funds were safe  During this time, I explained that I was in financial hardship and urgently needed access to my money, especially as I had my father’s funeral approaching Despite being promised that the issue would be fixed, nothing was resolved, and I was left having to borrow money just to get by  After weeks of chasing, I was finally told that my funds would be released I provided all requested documents, including identification and bank details However, shortly after, I received another email saying my funds would now be held for 60 days  This level of inconsistent communication is completely unacceptable I have done everything asked of me, yet I am left without access to over £1,100 and no clear resolution  The lack of timely responses often taking 4–5 days and the inability to speak directly to the SumUp Pay team has made this situation even worse  I am now escalating this matter further due to the distress and financial hardship this has caused  I strongly advise others to be cautious

title: My most memorable experience with SumUp…
body: My most memorable experience with SumUp dates back to when I returned from France to England I’d put my handbag in my suitcase before having it weighed, as I didn’t want to carry anything When I went to collect my suitcase, I couldn’t find it I reported it missing at London Airport they searched everywhere, checked the CCTV footage, and told me they couldn’t find my suitcase I thought to myself ‘This can’t be true’ About 45 minutes or an hour had passed when I received a notification from SumUp informing me that my card was being used in a drinks shop It took me a few more minutes to realise that my suitcase had been stolen Thank goodness I didn’t have any problems I followed the necessary steps with SumUp via the app, and I was fully reimbursed after a few days It was a relief Especially after I got back from my trip
